item.title: Cheese Stuffed Smoked Sausages
item.description: Cheese stuffed smoked sausages made with Zatarain's Smoked Sausage. A simple grilling idea for summer, available nationwide at Kroger, Walmart and more.

item.title: Watermelon Jello in a Watermelon
item.description: A fun watermelon jello dessert made right in the watermelon, with lots of fruit. A simple way to bring a little summer flavor back.
